hero.title: Independence Day
hero.reason: In honor of World UFO Day, Independence Day is a classic film that explores the idea of extraterrestrial life and invasion.
hero.blurb: With its epic space battles and memorable characters, Independence Day is a must-watch for fans of science fiction and action movies. The special effects still hold up today, making it a thrilling ride from start to finish.

released.title: Licence to Kill
released.reason: Released today in 1989, Licence to Kill is a notable film in the James Bond series, marking a darker and more violent turn for the franchise.
released.blurb: Timothy Dalton brings a new level of grit to the role of Bond, and the film's action sequences are intense and well-choreographed. With its complex characters and intricate plot, Licence to Kill is a compelling watch for fans of the series.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This cringe-worthy action film has been panned by critics and audiences alike, making it a hilariously bad watch for those who enjoy trainwrecks.
awful.blurb: With its nonsensical plot and over-the-top performances, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a masterclass in how not to make an action movie. It's a guilty pleasure that's so bad, it's good – but only if you're in the right mindset.
